entries.name: Vengeful Retreat
entries.desc: Remove all snares and vault away. Nearby enemies take 5 Physical damage.

entries.name: Felblade
entries.desc:
Charge to your target and deal 43 Fire damage.

Generates 15 Fury.

entries.name: Sigil of Misery
entries.desc:
Place a Sigil of Misery at the target location that activates after 2 sec.

Causes all enemies affected by the sigil to cower in fear, disorienting them for 15 sec.

entries.name: Vengeful Bonds
entries.desc: Vengeful Retreat reduces the movement speed of all nearby enemies by 70% for 3 sec.

entries.name: Unrestrained Fury
entries.desc: Increases maximum Fury by 20.

entries.name: Shattered Restoration
entries.desc: The healing of Shattered Souls is increased by 10%.

entries.name: Improved Sigil of Misery
entries.desc: Reduces the cooldown of Sigil of Misery by 30 sec.

entries.name: Bouncing Glaives
entries.desc: Throw Glaive ricochets to 1 additional target.

entries.name: Imprison
entries.desc: Imprisons a demon, beast, or humanoid, incapacitating them for 1 min. Damage may cancel the effect. Limit 1.

entries.name: Charred Warblades
entries.desc: You heal for 3% of all Fire damage you deal.

entries.name: Chaos Nova
entries.desc: Unleash an eruption of fel energy, dealing 9 Chaos damage and stunning all nearby enemies for 3 sec.

entries.name: Improved Disrupt
entries.desc: Increases the range of Disrupt to 10 yds.

entries.name: Consume Magic
entries.desc: Consume 1 beneficial Magic effect removing it from the target.

entries.name: Aldrachi Design
entries.desc: Increases your chance to parry by 3%.

entries.name: Focused Ire
entries.desc: The primary target of Chaos Nova is stunned for an additional 2 sec.

entries.name: Master of the Glaive
entries.desc: Throw Glaive has 2 charges and snares all enemies hit by 50% for 6 sec.

entries.name: Champion of the Glaive
entries.desc: Throw Glaive has 2 charges and 10 yard increased range.

entries.name: Disrupting Fury
entries.desc: Disrupt generates 30 Fury on a successful interrupt.

entries.name: Blazing Path
entries.desc: Shift gains an additional charge.

entries.name: Swallowed Anger
entries.desc: Consume Magic generates 20 Fury when a beneficial Magic effect is successfully removed from the target.

entries.name: Aura of Pain
entries.desc: Increases the critical strike chance of Immolation Aura by 6%.

entries.name: Live by the Glaive
entries.desc:
When you parry an attack or have one of your attacks parried, restore 2% of max health and 10 Fury. 

This effect may only occur once every 5 sec.

entries.name: Pursuit
entries.desc: Mastery increases your movement speed.

entries.name: Soul Rending
entries.desc:
Leech increased by 6%.

Gain an additional 6% leech while Metamorphosis is active.

entries.name: Felfire Haste
entries.desc: Fel Rush increases your movement speed by 10% for 8 sec.

entries.name: Infernal Armor
entries.desc: Immolation Aura increases your armor by 20% and causes melee attackers to suffer 4 Fire damage.

entries.name: Burn It Out
entries.desc: Immolation Aura removes 1 Disease effect.

entries.name: Soul Cleanse
entries.desc: Immolation Aura removes 1 Curse effect.

entries.name: Lost in Darkness
entries.desc: Spectral Sight has 5 sec reduced cooldown and no longer reduces movement speed.

entries.name: Illidari Knowledge
entries.desc: Reduces magic damage taken by 3%.

entries.name: Felbound
entries.desc: Your movement speed is increased by 3%.

entries.name: Will of the Illidari
entries.desc: Increases maximum health by 3%.

entries.name: Internal Struggle
entries.desc: Increases your mastery by 2.6%.

entries.name: Furious
entries.desc: Attacks and abilities that generate Fury deal 3% increased damage.

entries.name: Remorseless
entries.desc: Attacks and abilities that spend Fury deal 3% increased damage.

entries.name: First In, Last Out
entries.desc: Shift grants you a rapidly decaying shield equal to 6% of your maximum health.

entries.name: Erratic Felheart
entries.desc: The cooldown of Fel Rush is reduced by 1.0 sec.

entries.name: Final Breath
entries.desc: Fully channeling Void Ray increases the damage of its final tick by 300%.

entries.name: Darkness
entries.desc:
Summons darkness around you in an 8 yd radius, granting friendly targets a 15% chance to avoid all damage from an attack. Lasts 8 sec.

Chance to avoid damage increased by 100% when not in a raid.

entries.name: Demon Muzzle
entries.desc: Interrupting a spell with Disrupt decreases your magic damage taken by 15% for 12 sec.

entries.name: Soul Splitter
entries.desc: Any time you would generate one or more Soul Fragments, you have a 2% chance to generate an additional Soul Fragment.

entries.name: Wings of Wrath
entries.desc: Glide speed increased by 10%.

entries.name: Long Night
entries.desc: Increases the duration of Darkness by 3 sec.

entries.name: Pitch Black
entries.desc: Reduces the cooldown of Darkness by 120 sec.

entries.name: Demonic Resilience
entries.desc: Blur gains 1 additional charge.

entries.name: Fel Devastation
entries.desc: Unleash the fel within you, damaging enemies directly in front of you for 159 Fire damage over 2 sec.

entries.name: Spirit Bomb
entries.desc: Consume up to 5 Soul Fragments then explode, dealing 71 Fire damage to nearby enemies, increased by 20% per fragment consumed. Deals reduced damage beyond 8 targets.

entries.name: Fiery Brand
entries.desc: Brand yourself and an enemy target with demonic symbols, reducing the damage you take by 40% and instantly dealing 146 Fire damage to the enemy.

entries.name: Perfectly Balanced Glaive
entries.desc: Reduces the cooldown of Fracture by 1 sec and Throw Glaive by 6 sec.

entries.name: Quickened Sigils
entries.desc: Your Sigils activate 1 second faster.

entries.name: Ascending Flame
entries.desc: Sigil of Flame damage increased by 50%.

entries.name: Tempered Steel
entries.desc: Physical damage increased by 12%.

entries.name: Calcified Spikes
entries.desc: Demon Spikes reduces damage taken by 5% while active.

entries.name: Roaring Fire
entries.desc: Fel Devastation heals you for up to 50% more, based on your missing health.

entries.name: Sigil of Silence
entries.desc:
Place a Sigil of Silence at the target location that activates after 2 sec.

Silences all enemies affected by the sigil for 2 sec.

entries.name: Retaliation
entries.desc: While Demon Spikes is active, melee attacks against you cause the attacker to take 10 Physical damage. Generates high threat.

entries.name: Felfire Fist
entries.desc: Activating Infernal Strike out of combat or within 5 sec of entering combat places a Sigil of Flame at the target location.

entries.name: Sigil of Spite
entries.desc:
Place a demonic sigil at the target location that activates after 2 sec.

Detonates to deal 241 Chaos damage and shatter up to 3 Soul Fragments from enemies affected by the sigil. Deals reduced damage beyond 5 targets.

entries.name: Agonizing Flames
entries.desc: Immolation Aura increases your movement speed by 10% and its duration is increased by 50%.

entries.name: Feed the Demon
entries.desc: Every 20 Fury spent reduces the remaining cooldown of Demon Spikes by 1.00 sec.

entries.name: Burning Blood
entries.desc: Fire damage increased by 8%.

entries.name: Revel in Pain
entries.desc:
5.0% of your Fire damage shields you, up to a maximum of 3,055.

Shield and maximum values are doubled while Fiery Brand is active.

entries.name: Frailty
entries.desc:
Enemies struck by Sigil of Flame, Soul Cleave, and Spirit Bomb are afflicted with Frailty for 8 sec.

You heal for 8% of all damage you deal to targets with Frailty.

entries.name: Feast of Souls
entries.desc: Soul Cleave heals for an additional 63.

entries.name: Fallout
entries.desc: Immolation Aura's initial burst has a chance to shatter Soul Fragments from enemies.

entries.name: Ruinous Bulwark
entries.desc: Fel Devastation heals for an additional 10%, and 50% of its healing is converted into an absorb shield for 10 sec.

entries.name: Volatile Flameblood
entries.desc:
Immolation Aura has 10% increased critical strike chance and generates 1-5 Fury when it deals critical damage.

This effect may only occur once per 1 sec.

entries.name: Soul Barrier
entries.desc: Spirit Bomb shields you for 10 sec, absorbing 2,444 damage plus 611 for each Soul Fragment consumed.

entries.name: Soul Sigils
entries.desc: Afflicting an enemy with a Sigil generates 1 Soul Fragment.

entries.name: Fel Flame Fortification
entries.desc: You take 10% reduced magic damage while Immolation Aura is active.

entries.name: Void Reaver
entries.desc: Frailty now also reduces all damage you take from afflicted targets by 5%.

entries.name: Painbringer
entries.desc: Consuming a Soul Fragment reduces all damage you take by 3% for 8 sec.

entries.name: Sigil of Chains
entries.desc:
Place a Sigil of Chains at the target location that activates after 2 sec.

All enemies affected by the sigil are pulled to its center and are snared, reducing movement speed by 70% for 6 sec.

entries.name: Fiery Demise
entries.desc: Fiery Brand also increases Fire damage you deal to the target by 15%.

entries.name: Chains of Anger
entries.desc: Increases the duration of your Sigils by 2 sec and radius by 2 yds.

entries.name: Focused Cleave
entries.desc: Soul Cleave deals 60% increased damage to your primary target.

entries.name: Soulmonger
entries.desc: When consuming a Soul Fragment would heal you above full health it shields you instead, up to a maximum of 3,055.

entries.name: Stoke the Flames
entries.desc: Fel Devastation damage increased by 30%.

entries.name: Burning Alive
entries.desc: Every 1 sec, Fiery Brand spreads to one nearby enemy.

entries.name: Cycle of Binding
entries.desc: Your Sigils have 15% reduced cooldowns.

entries.name: Vulnerability
entries.desc: Frailty now also increases all damage you deal to afflicted targets by 3%.

entries.name: Vengeful Beast
entries.desc: Metamorphosis has 5 sec increased duration and increases the damage of Fracture, Soul Cleave, and Spirit Bomb by 20%.

entries.name: Charred Flesh
entries.desc: Immolation Aura damage increases the duration of your Fiery Brand and Sigil of Flame by 0.25 sec.

entries.name: Soulcrush
entries.desc: The effects of Frailty are doubled.

entries.name: Soul Carver
entries.desc: Carve into the soul of your target, dealing 171 Fire damage and an additional 104 Fire damage over 3 sec.  Immediately shatters 3 Soul Fragments from the target and 1 additional Soul Fragment every 1 sec.

entries.name: Last Resort
entries.desc:
Sustaining fatal damage instead transforms you to Metamorphosis form.

This may occur once every 8 min.

entries.name: Darkglare Boon
entries.desc: When Fel Devastation finishes fully channeling, it refreshes 15-30% of its cooldown and refunds 15-30 Fury.

entries.name: Down in Flames
entries.desc: Fiery Brand has 12 sec reduced cooldown and 1 additional charge.

entries.name: Untethered Rage
entries.desc: Soul Cleave and Spirit Bomb have a chance per soul fragment consumed to grant Untethered Rage, allowing Metamorphosis to be cast without incurring its cooldown and lasting 10 sec.

entries.name: Incisive Blade
entries.desc: Soul Cleave deals 10% increased damage.

entries.name: Army Unto Oneself
entries.desc: Felblade surrounds you with a Blade Ward, reducing damage taken by 10% for 5 sec.

entries.name: Incorruptible Spirit
entries.desc: Each Soul Fragment you consume shields you for an additional 15% of the amount healed.

entries.name: Wounded Quarry
entries.desc: Expose weaknesses in the target of your Reaver's Mark, causing your Physical damage to any enemy to also deal 30% of the damage dealt to your marked target as Chaos, and sometimes shatter a Soul Fragment.

entries.name: Fury of the Aldrachi
entries.desc:
When enhanced by Reaver's Glaive, Soul Cleave casts 3 additional glaive slashes to nearby targets. Deals reduced damage beyond 8 targets.

If cast after Shear, cast 6 slashes instead.

entries.name: Reaver's Mark
entries.desc:
When enhanced by Reaver's Glaive, Shear applies Reaver's Mark, which causes the target to take 7% increased damage for 20 sec. Max 2 stacks.

Applies 1 additional stack of Reaver's Mark If cast after Soul Cleave.

entries.name: Bladecraft
entries.desc:
Fury of the Aldrachi further empowers Blade Dance when cast after Chaos Strike, increasing slashes to 12.

Reaver's Mark now stacks up to 2 times and further empowers Chaos Strike when cast after Blade Dance, applying an additional stack.

entries.name: Keen Engagement
entries.desc: Reaver's Glaive generates 20 Fury.

entries.name: Preemptive Strike
entries.desc: Throw Glaive deals 7 Physical damage to enemies near its initial target.

entries.name: Evasive Action
entries.desc: Vengeful Retreat can be cast a second time within 3 sec.

entries.name: Unhindered Assault
entries.desc: Vengeful Retreat resets the cooldown of Felblade.

entries.name: Aldrachi Tactics
entries.desc: The second enhanced ability in a pattern shatters an additional Soul Fragment.

entries.name: Art of the Glaive
entries.desc:
Consuming 20 Soul Fragments or casting Sigil of Spite converts your next Throw Glaive into Reaver's Glaive.

 Reaver's Glaive: 
Throw a glaive enhanced with the essence of consumed souls at your target, dealing 134 Physical damage and ricocheting to 2 additional enemies.
 
Begins a well-practiced pattern of glaivework, enhancing your next Shear and Soul Cleave.

The enhanced ability you cast first deals 10% increased damage, and the second deals 20% increased damage.

entries.name: Thrill of the Fight
entries.desc: After consuming both enhancements, gain Thrill of the Fight, increasing the damage of your next Reaver's Glaive by 30% and increasing Haste by 8% for 30 sec.

entries.name: Warblade's Hunger
entries.desc: Consuming a Soul Fragment causes your next Shear to deal 21 additional Physical damage.

entries.name: Keen Edge
entries.desc: Reaver's Glaive damage is increased by 20% and other Physical-only damage is increased by 10%.

entries.name: Broken Spirit
entries.desc: The Hunt shatters 1 Soul Fragment. Blade Dance and Chaos Strike have a 15% chance to shatter a Soul Fragment.

entries.name: World Killer
entries.desc: The third Voidfall meteor strike called down in sequence is larger, has 50% increased area, deals 50% increased damage, and generates 1 Soul Fragment.

entries.name: Otherworldly Focus
entries.desc:
Collapsing Star and Voidfall meteors deal 35% increased damage when striking a single target.

Each additional target reduces this bonus by 5%.

entries.name: Dark Matter
entries.desc: Your first Collapsing Star after casting Void Metamorphosis causes a Cosmic meteor shower to assault the area, dealing 2,307 Cosmic damage over 6 sec.

entries.name: Final Hour
entries.desc: Passive bonuses granted by each stack of Voidfall persist for 8 sec after being consumed.

entries.name: Meteoric Fall
entries.desc: While at 3 stacks of Voidfall, Reap consumes all 3 to rapidly call down that many meteor strikes.

entries.name: Mass Acceleration
entries.desc: Gain 3 stacks of Voidfall and reset the cooldown of Reap upon activating Void Metamorphosis.

entries.name: Path to Oblivion
entries.desc: Each stack of Voidfall grants 3% increased movement speed.

entries.name: State of Matter
entries.desc: Shift has 1 additional charge.

entries.name: Voidfall
entries.desc:
Consume has a 35% chance to grant 1 stack of Voidfall.

Upon reaching 3 stacks of Voidfall, Reap consumes a stack to reach into the Void and call down a meteor strike at your target's location, dealing 674 Cosmic damage to all enemies within 8 yards. Damage reduced beyond 8 targets.

entries.name: Doomsayer
entries.desc: Activating Void Ray out of combat or within 5 sec of entering combat calls down 3 Voidfall Meteors over its duration.

entries.name: Harness the Cosmos
entries.desc: Voidfall Meteor damage increased by 15%.

entries.name: Celestial Echoes
entries.desc: Consume generates 2 additional Fury and deals 15% increased damage.

entries.name: Phase Shift
entries.desc: Each stack of Voidfall grants 2% reduced damage taken.

entries.name: Catastrophe
entries.desc: Enemies struck by a Voidfall Meteor take an additional 25% damage over 8 sec.

entries.name: Swift Erasure
entries.desc: Each stack of Voidfall grants 2% Haste.

entries.name: Meteoric Rise
entries.desc:
Void Ray damage increased by 15%.

Fully channeling Void Ray generates 1 stack of Voidfall.
